settings.title: Ajustes

whisperModels.baseQ8: Base Q8_0 — ~148 MB, best Metal quality

settings.sttModelHint: Metal uses AMD/Intel GPU via whisper.cpp. CPU uses CTranslate2.
settings.sttAppleHint: Uses macOS Speech framework via Banyan Speech. Click the button to trigger the permission dialog, then allow Banyan Speech in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Speech Recognition.
settings.deepgramHint: Streaming STT over WebSocket. Try Nova-2 or Base if you need lower latency.
settings.deepgramKeyLink: Get a key at console.deepgram.com
settings.localStackHint: Opus-MT (~600 MB) + optional Qwen2.5-0.5B polish (~400 MB), all CTranslate2 on this Mac.
settings.aiPolish: AI polish — local Qwen2.5-0.5B fixes STT/MT errors before TTS
settings.polishHint: Same stack as Whisper/Opus-MT (CTranslate2). Adds ~1–3 s per phrase on CPU.
settings.appleTranslateHint: Uses macOS Translation API (macOS 15+). Language packs must be installed — System Settings → General → Language & Region, or the Translate app. Works offline once installed.
settings.openrouterKeyLink: Get a key at openrouter.ai/keys
settings.langHint: Select a language, then download additional voices from the Voice section below.
settings.audioLevelHint: Input level bars show signal while Settings are open. Speak into the MacBook mic to test Microphone; play audio into Call Input (e.g. Telegram) to test the virtual device.
settings.endpointingHint: Lower = faster response, may cut sentences. Higher = waits longer for complete sentences.
settings.polishInstalled: Polish model installed — Save & restart engine
settings.selectModelHint: Select a model (free + low latency recommended for live calls)

voice.noTts: No hay voz TTS para {lang}. Traducción sin audio.

stt.whisperDisabledDeepgram: Whisper desactivado — Deepgram en la nube
stt.checkFailed: No se pudo comprobar el modelo STT
stt.appleUnavailable: Reconocimiento de voz no disponible para su idioma
stt.appleDenied: Permita Banyan Speech en Ajustes del sistema
stt.appleGrant: Banyan Speech disponible — conceda permiso al primer uso

translation.appleSelected: Banyan Translate seleccionado — ver panel abajo
translation.checkFailed: No se pudieron comprobar los modelos
translation.appleCheckFailed: No se pudo comprobar Banyan Translate
translation.applePairUnsupported: Par de idiomas no compatible con Banyan Translate
translation.appleReady: Listo — paquetes de idioma instalados (sin conexión)
translation.appleSupported: Compatible pero no descargado — instale paquetes de idioma

tooltips.micOut: Your microphone (outgoing). Green = on, grey = muted.
tooltips.micIn: Incoming call audio (their speech). Mute during solo test to avoid echo loop.
tooltips.tabAudio: Capture audio from a browser tab (replaces BlackHole for incoming)

hints.whisperAuto: Auto: Metal prefers base-q8_0 → base → tiny. CPU picks smallest CT2 installed.
hints.whisperTiny: Tiny — ~75 MB. Fastest STT. Good for live calls.
hints.whisperBase: Base — ~145 MB. Balance of speed and accuracy.
hints.whisperBaseQ8: Base Q8_0 — ~148 MB. Higher-precision GGML quant for Metal GPU (recommended).
hints.whisperSmall: Small — ~460 MB. Best accuracy, slowest on CPU.
hints.sttMetalMode: Metal mode: whisper.cpp on GPU (AMD Radeon / Intel).
hints.dgNova3: Best accuracy for live calls. Default.
hints.dgNova2: Often lower latency than Nova-3; good for RU/EN.
hints.dgNova: Older Nova — may be faster, less accurate.
hints.dgBase: Fastest Deepgram model; weaker on accents and RU.
hints.dgWhisperLarge: OpenAI Whisper large hosted by Deepgram.

toast.didNotStart: Engine did not start — check API keys and model
toast.savedPressStart: Settings saved — press Start to translate
